Issues: Low level of detail: The image is extremely simple, which might limit its appeal to high-end commercial buyers seeking complex illustrations.
Lack of professional finishing: For high-quality commercial printing, the resolution and line work need to be crisp and highly refined. The current execution is very basic.
Style Ambiguity: While cute, the style is generic. To increase commercial appeal, a more unique or highly defined artistic style would be beneficial.
Composition is basic: The image is a close-up headshot, which is fine, but lacks dynamic composition for broader commercial use.
Technical skill (as perceived commercially): While the drawing is complete, optimizing the technique for high-fidelity print would improve commercial viability.
